title: Delta Sharing on Lakehouse Federation is in Beta
body: You can now use Delta Sharing to share foreign schemas and tables created with query federation in Databricks-to-Databricks sharing and open sharing. See [Add foreign schemas or tables to a share](/aws/en/opensharing/create-share#foreign-asset) and [Read data in a shared foreign table or foreign schema](/aws/en/opensharing/read-data-databricks#foreign-tables).

ref_links.text: Add foreign schemas or tables to a share
Read data in a shared foreign table or foreign schema
